metadata.name: proofbet
metadata.description: ProofBet parimutuel market for World Cup soccer props

accounts.name: settle_authority
docs: The caller. Must equal `contest.settle_authority` (the keeper) UNLESS the
grace period past `settle_after_ts` has elapsed, in which case anyone may
void. Because that authorization is conditional it's checked in the handler,
not via a fixed `has_one` (the account stays named `settle_authority` so the
common keeper call sites read naturally).

errors.name: EntryCloseInPast
errors.msg: entry_close_ts must be in the future

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: fee_bps exceeds the maximum allowed

errors.name: PredicateMismatch
errors.msg: stat_key2 and op must both be set or both be None

errors.name: MarketNotOpen
errors.msg: market is not open

errors.name: EntryClosed
errors.msg: entry window has closed

errors.name: EntryNotClosed
errors.msg: entry window is still open

errors.name: InvalidBucket
errors.msg: invalid bucket for this market's outcome count

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: bet amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: NotClaimable
errors.msg: market is not in a claimable state

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer is not authorized for this action

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: arithmetic overflow

errors.name: ContestNotOpen
errors.msg: contest is not open

errors.name: ContestNotTerminal
errors.msg: contest is not in a terminal (claimable) state

errors.name: ContestStillLive
errors.msg: a contest is already live; settle or void it first

errors.name: InvalidContestId
errors.msg: contest_id must be non-zero

errors.name: SettleTooEarly
errors.msg: too early to settle this contest

errors.name: InvalidMatchCount
errors.msg: num_matches must be between 3 and 5

errors.name: InvalidPick
errors.msg: pick must be 0/1/2 within num_matches and 0 beyond it

errors.name: ResultMarketMismatch
errors.msg: result market account does not match the card fixture

errors.name: ResultMarketNotSettled
errors.msg: result market is not settled

errors.name: PerfectCountZero
errors.msg: perfect_count must be greater than zero to pay a winner

errors.name: VaultInsolvent
errors.msg: vault would drop below its rent floor or exceed distributable

errors.name: InvalidFixtureId
errors.msg: fixture_id must be non-zero for each carded match

errors.name: InvalidBucketCount
errors.msg: num_buckets must be 2 (binary) or 3 (three-way)

errors.name: InvalidMarketId
errors.msg: market_id must be non-zero for each carded leg

errors.name: PerfectCountExceedsEntries
errors.msg: perfect_count cannot exceed entry_count

errors.name: InvalidPoolId
errors.msg: pool_id must be non-zero

errors.name: InvalidCallCount
errors.msg: num_calls must be between 1 and MAX_CALLS

errors.name: PoolNotOpen
errors.msg: live pool is not open for joining

errors.name: PoolNotLive
errors.msg: live pool is not open or live

errors.name: PoolNotEnded
errors.msg: live pool has not ended

errors.name: PoolNotTerminal
errors.msg: live pool is not in a terminal (claimable) state

errors.name: PoolNotVoidable
errors.msg: live pool cannot be voided from its current state

errors.name: JoinClosed
errors.msg: joins have closed for this pool

errors.name: CallStillOpen
errors.msg: a call is already open; resolve it first

errors.name: CallSeqMismatch
errors.msg: call seq must equal the cursor's next_seq

errors.name: CallLimitReached
errors.msg: call limit reached for this pool

errors.name: CallNotOpen
errors.msg: call is not open

errors.name: CallNotResolved
errors.msg: call is not resolved

errors.name: AnswerWindowClosed
errors.msg: the answer window for this call has closed

errors.name: ScoreOutOfOrder
errors.msg: calls must be scored in order (seq == next_score_seq)

errors.name: NotAllScored
errors.msg: every seat must be scored through all resolved calls before settle

errors.name: ScoreMismatch
errors.msg: a passed entry account failed PDA/owner/coverage binding

errors.name: InvalidOption
errors.msg: option must be within the call's num_options

errors.name: NotEnoughPlayers
errors.msg: a live pool needs at least 2 players to settle

errors.name: WinnerCountZero
errors.msg: winner_count must be greater than zero to pay a winner

types.name: Call
docs: One call window + its resolved outcome. Seeds: `[b"call", pool_key, seq]`.

fields.name: market_ids
docs: market_id per leg: leg i = (fixtures[i], market_ids[i]). Indices >= num_legs
stay zero. A v2 parlay reads, e.g., markets [16,15,12,11] on one fixture.

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = no payout (loser/rolled), 1 = win share, 2 = void refund.

fields.name: pot
docs: This contest's own entry pot at settle (contest.lamports - rent_floor).

fields.name: jackpot_in
docs: Jackpot pool moved INTO the contest on a win (0 on rollover).

fields.name: jackpot_out
docs: Jackpot pool received FROM the contest on a rollover (post-rake pot; 0 on a win).

fields.name: num_buckets
docs: 2 = binary over/under, 3 = three-way home/draw/away.

types.name: Jackpot
docs: Singleton escrow whose lamport balance (above its own rent floor) IS the
rolling jackpot. Persists across every contest — that persistence is the
rollover. In v2 it carries NO `active_contest_id`/`reserved`: contests are
independent and each holds its OWN entry pot (the Contest PDA), so the only
cross-contest money path is this rolling pool (in on rollover, out on a win).

fields.name: bump
docs: lamports above this PDA's rent floor == the rolling pool.

types.name: LiveCursor
docs: The live call cursor. Delegated to the ER alongside entries in SLICE 2; holds
no lamports beyond its own rent. Seeds: `[b"livecursor", pool_key]`.

types.name: LiveEntry
docs: A seat + running score. The account the ER mutates on every tap-resolve in
SLICE 2. Seeds: `[b"liveentry", pool_key, player_key]`. One seat per (pool,
player) — created with `init` (not `init_if_needed`), so the invariant
`pot == player_count * entry_price` holds exactly (the void-refund solvency
check depends on it).

fields.name: picks
docs: Per-call locked option; `NO_PICK` = never locked. Indexed by call seq.
A full per-call array (not a single pending slot) so a later tap never
clobbers an earlier, not-yet-scored pick.

types.name: LivePool
docs: The pot + terminal state. **Base-layer only, never delegated.** Its lamport
balance above the rent floor IS the pot (like Contest). Seeds:
`[b"livepool", pool_id.to_le_bytes()]`.

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = no payout (loser/rolled), 1 = win share, 2 = void refund.

fields.name: pot
docs: This pool's own entry pot at settle (pool.lamports - rent_floor).

fields.name: market_id
docs: Distinguishes markets on the same fixture (0 = goals, 1 = corners).

fields.name: entry_close_ts
docs: Entry deadline in UNIX SECONDS (Clock::unix_timestamp). Bets rejected at/after.

fields.name: num_buckets
docs: Number of outcomes (2 = binary over/under, 3 = home/draw/away). Indices
`>= num_buckets` of `bucket_totals` / `amounts` stay zero.

fields.name: settled_ts
docs: The TxLINE batch minTimestamp in MILLISECONDS used to derive the
Txoracle daily_scores PDA (epochDay = settled_ts / 86_400_000).

fields.name: settled_value
docs: Resolved left-hand side: val_a, or (val_a op val_b) for two-stat predicates.
Only meaningful when `status == Settled` (and on settle's zero-winner void).
A standalone `void_market` leaves this 0 — an abandoned fixture has no stat.

fields.name: settled_ts
docs: TxLINE batch minTimestamp in MILLISECONDS (not seconds); derives the
Txoracle daily_scores PDA via epochDay = settled_ts / 86_400_000.

fields.name: settled_ts
docs: TxLINE batch minTimestamp in MILLISECONDS (not seconds).

types.name: Vault
docs: Program-owned PDA that escrows pooled lamports.
The pool balance is the account's native lamport balance (not a stored field);
this struct holds only the PDA bump so the program can sign for / debit it.
